subcodes.first_line: Verily I am the Promised One, Whose Day all await and unto Whom all have been promised. God hath created Me through His command and made Me to stand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اننی انا القائم الذی کل ینتظرون یومه و کل به یوعدون قد خلقتی الله بامره و جعلنی قائما
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @chastisement and requital, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im
